text:
INCIDENT REPORT #007
Facility: Plant 7 - Baton Rouge
Asset: Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6
Severity: LOW

DESCRIPTION
On the shift of record, operators observed a sharp rise in vibration amplitude
on the Cooling Tower Fan CTF-6. The unit was taken offline for inspection. Estimated downtime: 45.1 hours.

ROOT CAUSE
Root cause investigation is still open pending vendor teardown report.

CORRECTIVE ACTION
Interim monitoring increased; formal RCA to follow within 10 business days.
